title: Light Machine
body:
# 🌟 Light Machine

*An autonomous, radius-wide torch placer for painless spawn-proofing.*

---

## What It Does
* Adds a single new block: the **Light Machine**.
* Light Machine scans for blocks with a **light level ≤ 4** in a **512-block radius** (horizontal & vertical).
* When it finds a dark spot, it **automatically places one of its own torches** there.

> Perfect for lighting vast caves, open fields, or entire bases without manual labor.

---

## Inventory & Torch Supply
| Capacity | Accepted Item | Behavior when Empty |
|----------|---------------|---------------------|
| **9 Slots** | Vanilla **torch** item | Machine pauses until torches are supplied |

*Torches are consumed one-for-one as they are placed—no duplicates, no infinity.*

---

## How to Use
1. **Craft** the Light Machine.
2. **Place** the block in the world.
3. **Open** its GUI and **load torches** into any slot.
4. **Walk away**—the machine quietly lights up the darkness around you over time.

![Awaiting content](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/te06RRO7/images/7e2ff7a284bf87967fef34b88797aad2bc86f823.jpeg)

---

## Ideal For
- 100 % **spawn-proof** bases and farms  
- Hassle-free **cave illumination** before mining  
- Server administrators who want safer **spawn areas** without world-editing

---

Happy lighting, and goodbye to surprise creepers! 💡

See [my other mods](https://modrinth.com/user/Pepsied)
